deploymentDetails.description: Canary deployment for checkout orchestration changes. Traffic is currently serving 35% through the new release.
Rolling deployment completed after validating pricing rule cache invalidation across all production pods.
Canary stopped after search indexing errors exceeded the deployment guardrail threshold.
Blue-green switch completed after provider timeout handling was validated against live payment traffic.
Blue environment is warming supplier feed workers before traffic cutover.
Deployment was rolled back after refresh token claim validation failed for a legacy mobile client.
Notification template deployment completed and retry metrics are within normal bounds.
Rolling deployment is applying scoped rollout rules with audit logging enabled.
Partition-aware retry workers are rolling across the observability cluster.
Provider settlement delta export is live and reconciliation workers are healthy.
Gateway canary was rolled back after version-specific throttling rejected Android 8 clients.
Export workers are draining existing jobs before the resumable job scheduler is activated.

alerts.title: Checkout canary breaching payment authorization SLO
alerts.impact: Card payments are intermittently failing for the checkout canary cohort. Traffic is still limited to 15%, but error budget burn is accelerating.

alerts.title: Search indexing lag above freshness target
alerts.impact: New catalog items and price updates are delayed in search results, but checkout and browsing remain available.

alerts.title: Billing settlement queue approaching retry limit
alerts.impact: Settlement exports are delayed for the current batch. Customer-facing billing is unaffected while retries remain below hard limit.

alerts.title: Feature flag cache miss rate elevated after rollout
alerts.impact: Flag evaluation latency is slightly elevated for first reads after deployment. No incorrect flag values have been observed.

alerts.title: Inventory sync replica behind write leader
alerts.impact: Inventory availability can be stale in the admin console. Customer inventory reservations still read from the leader.

alerts.title: Email provider sandbox is returning transient 5xx
alerts.impact: Staging email verification flows may retry. Production provider traffic is healthy.

alerts.title: Metrics aggregator cardinality guard triggered
alerts.impact: High-cardinality labels were dropped before ingestion pressure affected alert delivery.

alerts.title: Export worker retry backlog during scheduler migration
alerts.impact: Large scheduled exports are delayed while old workers drain. Interactive exports remain prioritized.

alerts.title: Mobile gateway p95 latency recovered after regional failover
alerts.impact: Mobile checkout latency briefly exceeded the SLO during failover, then returned to normal after traffic shifted.

releaseDetails.description: Refactor checkout orchestration and prepare the payment handoff for the next gateway rollout.
Deploy dynamic pricing rule evaluation with improved cache invalidation and audit traces.
Roll out profile preference migration and add fallback reads for older profile documents.
Introduce the next ranking model with canary traffic limits and model drift monitoring.
Improve delivery templates and add retry observability for notification batches.
Improve search relevance and add synonym support.
Promote gateway resilience patches and reconcile provider timeout handling.
Add scoped rollout rules and audit logging for feature flag changes.
Ship incremental stock reconciliation with backpressure handling for supplier feeds.
Introduce risk-score enrichment for checkout sessions with canary safeguards.
Refresh order activity timelines and add carrier handoff event grouping.
Reduce metric rollup lag and add partition-aware retries for late events.
Add resumable customer export jobs and signed download audit records.
Rotate session signing keys and roll out short-lived refresh token claims.
Finalize invoice reconciliation improvements and export provider settlement deltas.
Index audit events by actor and resource to improve support investigation lookup.
Route mobile clients through the new gateway with per-version throttling controls.
Run retention policy jobs in development with expanded dry-run reporting.

serviceDetails.name: checkout-api
serviceDetails.description: Coordinates cart validation, tax calculation, and the payment handoff for checkout sessions.

serviceDetails.name: pricing-svc
serviceDetails.description: Serves price books, discounts, and contract pricing for cart and checkout traffic.

serviceDetails.name: search-svc
serviceDetails.description: Indexes product documents and serves query results for storefront search and recommendations.

serviceDetails.name: payments-svc
serviceDetails.description: Authorizes payment intents and reconciles gateway responses for completed checkout flows.

serviceDetails.name: inventory-sync
serviceDetails.description: Replicates stock changes from warehouse events into commerce-facing inventory projections.

serviceDetails.name: auth-core
serviceDetails.description: Issues service tokens, validates user sessions, and enforces identity policy at the edge.

serviceDetails.name: email-svc
serviceDetails.description: Queues transactional email, bounce handling, and delivery status callbacks for customer messaging.

serviceDetails.name: feature-flags
serviceDetails.description: Evaluates rollout rules for product launches, experiments, and operational kill switches.

serviceDetails.name: mobile-gateway
serviceDetails.description: Aggregates product, account, and checkout APIs into the mobile app surface.

serviceDetails.name: metrics-agg
serviceDetails.description: Aggregates service telemetry into rollup windows for dashboards and deployment health checks.

serviceDetails.name: export-worker
serviceDetails.description: Processes customer export requests and writes signed data packages to object storage.

serviceDetails.name: billing-recon
serviceDetails.description: Matches settled payments against invoices, refunds, and ledger entries before finance export.

environments.name: Development
environments.description: Shared integration environment for feature branches and daily service builds.

environments.name: QA
environments.description: Automated validation environment for regression, contract, and exploratory testing.

environments.name: Staging
environments.description: Production-like environment for release candidates, load checks, and approval runs.

environments.name: Production
environments.description: Customer-facing production environment with protected deploy windows and SRE approvals.

environments.name: Preview
environments.description: Ephemeral customer-review environments for product demos and pull-request previews.

environmentDetails.name: Development
environmentDetails.purpose: Fast feedback for service teams. Deploys are open by default and reset jobs keep data predictable.

readiness.label: Schema sandbox
readiness.description: Latest migrations applied to disposable databases.

environmentDetails.name: QA
environmentDetails.purpose: Catches regressions before release candidates enter protected staging lanes.

readiness.label: Regression suite
readiness.description: Checkout and search flows are still running.

environmentDetails.name: Staging
environmentDetails.purpose: Final validation for production candidates using production-like topology and masked data.

controls.deployPolicy: Promotion only after QA gates pass

readiness.label: Release approvals
readiness.description: SRE and Platform approvals are complete.

readiness.label: Load profile
readiness.description: Steady-state load test stayed inside SLO.

environmentDetails.name: Production
environmentDetails.purpose: Live customer traffic with protected deployment windows, approval gates, and incident-aware release controls.

readiness.label: Incident guard
readiness.description: Search Service incident is still active.

environmentDetails.name: Preview
environmentDetails.purpose: Ephemeral review environments for pull requests, customer demos, and stakeholder sign-off.

readiness.label: Public tunnel
readiness.description: Next customer demo tunnel opens on demand.
